slides.name: Astro 10i
slides.desc: Part of QS Technology's premium line. Powerful specs and a high-speed interpolation algorithm deliver smooth, stable machining — far beyond conventional controllers.

slides.name: Astro 6AH
slides.desc: The flagship 6-axis closed-loop line with EtherCAT and Mechatrolink MII/MIII — built for mould-making and medical components that demand the highest precision.

slides.name: F86
slides.desc: A 6-axis controller for a wide range of machines — milling, jigsaw cutting, gluing. Supports Pulse Train and EtherCAT control, easy to integrate, cost-optimised.

products.heading: QS Controllers
products.lede: Six controller lines for milling, turning, bending, and gluing — choose by axis count and control protocol.

items.name: F86 Controller
items.desc: A 6-axis controller for a wide range of machines. Supports Pulse Train — EtherCAT control.

items.name: Astro 6AH Controller
items.desc: The flagship 6-axis closed-loop line, EtherCAT, for high-precision mould-making and medical components.

items.name: F86 Controller
items.desc: A 6-axis controller for a wide range of machines. Supports Pulse Train — EtherCAT control.

about.eyebrow: [ About us · Founded in Ho Chi Minh City ]
about.heading: About QS Technology Co., LTD.
about.p1: QS Technology Co., LTD. We are proud to be a pioneer in developing, applying, and commercialising “Made By Vietnam” CNC controllers. After years of development, products bearing the QS Technology brand have earned growing trust and interest from customers at home and abroad.
about.p2: Drawing on the strengths and experience accumulated over many years in machine building, automation systems, and electronic circuit boards, we confidently master the core technology, diversify our offerings, and satisfy our customers' needs.
about.caption: Ho Chi Minh City factory

cta.heading: Need a controller for a specialised machine?
cta.body: By fully mastering our technology — from design, programming, and operating-system development to manufacturing and maintenance — we develop new products, improve existing ones, and meet customers' special requirements quickly and flexibly.
